scripts.build: dotnet build src/Api/Api.csproj && npm run build --prefix src/web
scripts.test: dotnet test && npm run test:unit --prefix src/web
scripts.test:unit: dotnet test && npm run test:unit --prefix src/web
scripts.lint: biome check src/web && dotnet format src/Api/Api.csproj --verify-no-changes
scripts.format: biome check --write src/web && dotnet format src/Api/Api.csproj
